description: Keeps the deliberately-pinned versions fresh: Terraform providers (terraform manager), umbrella-chart dependencies in kubernetes/apps/*/Chart.yaml (helmv3 manager), container images in helm values (helm-values manager, e.g. the cloudflared image), and the helm chart pins living in *.tfvars via the annotated regex manager below.

customManagers.description: Helm chart pins in *.tfvars annotated `# renovate: helmRepo=<url> chart=<name>`
